subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth and doth proclaim that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات بالحق و ینطق انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
